title: Beautiful Buckets
description: Slightly retextures all buckets in vanilla and mods
body:
This resource pack only changes the edges of the buckets to make them appear to have more depth and shine, while still looking vanilla-like.

# Compatibility
- Vanilla Minecraft
- [Bucket of Frog](https://modrinth.com/mod/bucket-of-frog)
- [Crabber's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/crabbers-delight)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics)
- [Create Confectionery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-confectionery)
- [Create: Dragons Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dragons-plus)
- [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry)
- [Create: Misc and Things](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-misc-and-things)
- [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)
- [Create: Diesel Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators)
- [Create Nuclear](https://modrinth.com/mod/createnuclear)
- [Create: Power Grid](https://modrinth.com/mod/power-grid)
- [Quicksand (NeoForge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quicksand-neoforge)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Create: The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg)
- [Villager In A Bucket](https://modrinth.com/plugin/villager-in-a-bucket)
- [Wan's Ancient Beasts](https://modrinth.com/mod/wab)

# Automatic Compatibility
- [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)
